name: claim-analytics-platform
description: Litigation finance analytics platform — Monte Carlo simulation, investment analysis, and interactive dashboards for arbitration claim portfolios

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,app,dashboard -c blue,green,magenta "cd server && node server.js" "cd app && npx vite --port 5180" "cd dashboard && npx vite --port 5173"
scripts.build: cd dashboard && npm run build && cd ../app && npm run build
